allow: Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6IjY5N2QxODg4MDU5NmY3MTFmODQ2ODU2YSIsInJvbGUiOiJwc3ljaG9sb2dpc3QiLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NDAyNzYsImV4cCI6MTc3NDkyNjY3Nn0.hii0jQztzriPMnciZ9ku0uFeSEcwxJL5Oalcwd2W01c" __NEW_LINE_435c8bb8d3c12518__ echo "=== TESTE 1: Convidar e-mail novo \(deve funcionar\) ===" curl -s https://health-mind-app.vercel.app/api/invitations/patient -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -d '{""""email"""":""""teste.reconv.1@mailinator.com"""",""""name"""":""""Paciente Teste 1"""",""""phone"""":""""61999990001""""}')

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6IjY5N2QxODg4MDU5NmY3MTFmODQ2ODU2YSIsInJvbGUiOiJwc3ljaG9sb2dpc3QiLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NDAyNzYsImV4cCI6MTc3NDkyNjY3Nn0.hii0jQztzriPMnciZ9ku0uFeSEcwxJL5Oalcwd2W01c" INVITE_ID="69c9e9e088c41d4059219972" __NEW_LINE_1e30c9851f125ad0__ echo "=== TESTE 2: Tentar re-convidar enquanto tem convite ativo \(deve bloquear\) ===" curl -s https://health-mind-app.vercel.app/api/invitations/patient -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -d '{""""email"""":""""teste.reconv.1@mailinator.com"""",""""name"""":""""Paciente Teste 1""""}')

Bash(/dev/null __NEW_LINE_1e30c9851f125ad0__ echo echo '=== TESTE 3: Cancelar o convite ===' curl -s https://health-mind-app.vercel.app/api/invitations/$INVITE_ID -X DELETE -H 'Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN')

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6IjY5N2QxODg4MDU5NmY3MTFmODQ2ODU2YSIsInJvbGUiOiJwc3ljaG9sb2dpc3QiLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NDAyNzYsImV4cCI6MTc3NDkyNjY3Nn0.hii0jQztzriPMnciZ9ku0uFeSEcwxJL5Oalcwd2W01c" __NEW_LINE_6dd3d61d2f86ead9__ echo "=== TESTE 4: Re-convidar após cancelamento \(BUG ANTIGO - deve funcionar agora\) ===" curl -s https://health-mind-app.vercel.app/api/invitations/patient -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -d '{""""email"""":""""teste.reconv.1@mailinator.com"""",""""name"""":""""Paciente Teste 1 Corrigido"""",""""phone"""":""""61999990001""""}')

Bash(TOKEN="eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6IjY5N2QxODg4MDU5NmY3MTFmODQ2ODU2YSIsInJvbGUiOiJwc3ljaG9sb2dpc3QiLCJpYXQiOjE3NzQ4NDAyNzYsImV4cCI6MTc3NDkyNjY3Nn0.hii0jQztzriPMnciZ9ku0uFeSEcwxJL5Oalcwd2W01c" NEW_INVITE_ID="69c9e9f888c41d405921998c" __NEW_LINE_5090815a15842e40__ echo "=== TESTE 5: Editar convite pendente \(nome + renovar prazo\) ===" curl -s https://health-mind-app.vercel.app/api/invitations/$NEW_INVITE_ID -X PATCH -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" -d '{""""name"""":""""Paciente Editado Teste"""",""""phone"""":""""61988887777"""",""""birthDate"""":""""1990-06-15""""}')
